ground_truth.title: Affordable Social Media Marketing Packages & Pricing
ground_truth.main_content: Softtrix offers comprehensive social media marketing packages designed for businesses of all sizes. Our services include strategy development, content creation and design, platform management, audience engagement, performance tracking and reporting, and paid ad campaign management. We manage social media presence across Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X (Twitter), Pinterest, TikTok, and YouTube. Pricing tiers include Starter at $399/month for small businesses (1-2 platforms, 3 posts/week, monthly reporting), Growth at $699/month for mid-size brands (3-4 platforms, 5 posts/week, bi-weekly reporting), Pro at $999/month for large businesses (up to 5 platforms, daily posting, weekly reporting), and Custom pricing for enterprises. Our packages are designed to boost engagement, reach, and ROI. With 5.42 billion social media users worldwide and projected ad spend of $276.7 billion in 2025, businesses cannot afford to miss out on social media marketing. We serve startups seeking online visibility, local businesses targeting their community, e-commerce brands promoting products, SaaS and B2B companies building trust, and enterprises scaling their digital presence.
with: Social Media Marketing Packages Designed Ideally For Your Business
We offer flexible and scalable social media packages that not just fit the user's needs but also help businesses to shine all the way long
There are 5.42 billion total social media users worldwide, with an average person using 6.83 different social networks per month
Our social media packages are strategically designed to grow the brand with a measurable impact
We have helped a dozen clients to increase their user engagement, followers, and to analyse consistent and high-quality campaigns
